# Copilot instructions — pf (Wineury portfolio)

Read **`AGENTS.md`** first. It is the shared source of truth for all agents in this repository.

Quick facts:

- **Repo:** `wineurya/pf` — personal portfolio (React 19 + Vite 6). Short name **pf**.
- **Path (local):** `C:\Users\xezrh\Documents\Portfolio - April\pf`
- **Dev:** `npm run dev` -> port 5180; use `PORT=3000` when Avance runs on 3001.
- **Sibling:** Avance PWA at `C:\Users\xezrh\Documents\Avance` — see `../Avance/AGENTS.md`.
- **Content:** case studies in `src/content.js`; styles in `src/styles/tokens.css` + `app.css`.
- **Covers:** intrinsic image aspect ratio; InCity -> `src/assets/case/incity-cover.webp`.
- **Ponytail:** minimal correct code — `.cursor/rules/ponytail.mdc`, `.agents/skills/ponytail*`.
- **Never commit:** secrets, private research, inspiration, raw prompts, `.env*`.
- **Verify:** `npm run build` before done; no agent co-authorship on commits.

Handoff notes: `docs/agent-handoff.md` (sanitized only).
